---
title: "On Prize-Linked Savings"
description: "It’s basically a no-lose lottery; you get the chance to hit a big payday, but you still get to keep your money if you don’t."
author:
  - name: TJ Palanca
    url: https://www.twitter.com/tjpalanca
date: 05-08-2012
output:
```{r fig.cap="For the Philippines, Prize-linked savings could be the savings product that produces the best fit.", out.width="300px"}
knitr::include_graphics("images/20120508-prize-linked-savings-piggy.jpg")
```
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
preview: images/20120508-prize-linked-savings-piggy.jpg
categories:
```{r fig.cap="For the Philippines, Prize-linked savings could be the savings product that produces the best fit.", out.width="300px"}
knitr::include_graphics("images/20120508-prize-linked-savings-piggy.jpg")
```
  - business
  - economics
preview: images/20120508-prize-linked-savings-piggy.jpg
categories:
  - business
  - economics
---
